packageDirectories.versionDescription: Bootstrap metadata for the Electra Automotive Lead-to-Test-Drive workshop: custom objects (Vehicle_Model__c, Test_Drive_Slot__c, Vehicle_Inventory__c), 4 agent-backing autolaunched flows + 2 student-facing screen flows (Sembrar/Resetear), idempotent Apex seeder + reset, Lightning App + Home flexipage with one-click data buttons, permission set, 3 Spanish PDFs as Data Library content, and the Electra Customer Portal Experience Cloud LWR site (Network + DigitalExperienceBundle) wired to MIAW. Students BUILD the agent, the Data Library, and the MIAW chat deployment during the workshop.
